title: inula lineata
intro: Inula lineata, also known as the linear-foliated elecampane, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Inula lineata include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Inula lineata is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to create a variety of herbal preparations.
